title: Eval skill writes a modular skill-local task
query: Add an eval for the advise skill that proves it chooses among three options and recommends one path. Use the normal eval skill workflow.
reference_points: Chooses a skill-local file such as skills/advise/eval_task.json for advise-specific behavior
Keeps AGI Toy Shop setup in shared context instead of repeating it inside the query
Writes a realistic user request as the task query
Uses visible string reference_points that can pass or fail
Avoids live config mutation, deploys, pushes, or private user paths
notes: Reinforces the standard that skill-specific evals live beside the owning skill as eval_task.json.
